The '''Class-L cargo container''' was a polyhedral spheroid-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] and designed to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] such as a [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The container was designed with the cargo linkage systems of both the [[cargo tanker]] and [[Virella Systems cargo freighter|cargo freighter]] in mind, though its shape allowed a versatility in transporting usage.<ref name="XWA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
